traitLibrary.name: Neon Nocturne

rendering.lineLanguage: Fine hand-authored pixel steps with solid ink masses
rendering.anatomy: Fixed three-quarter vampire bust, oversized near ear and oval eyes
rendering.glow: Restricted to founder supernatural eye and pumpkin cutouts

rules: No cross, crucifix, pentagram, or religious reference
No text, logo, signature, or watermark
